description: The Great Rhetra, traditionally attributed to Lycurgus, established the foundations of Spartan society and the Agoge. From early childhood, Spartan citizens were raised through rigorous military training, producing generations of disciplined warriors whose skill and experience culminated in the elite Spartiates.
tooltip: Spartiates (Champion Hoplites) are available in Town Phase. They begin as Young Hoplites (Paidiskoi), who cost 80 Food, 40 Wood, and 80 Metal, train 20% faster than standard Champions, but have −20% attack, −1 Hack and Pierce Resistance, and −25 Health. They promote into Hebontes (standard Champion Hoplites) and can eventually become Hippeis, Sparta's elite Royal Guard.
